title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Excited Spectator
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Who do you think is going to win this year's
Derby?

text_block_list.name: TV-Loving Spectator
text_block_list.text:
No doubt one of the big three. That's what they
said on TV!

text_block_list.name: Excited Spectator
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I bet it'll be the nepo baby. You
know, that legendary racer's daughter!

text_block_list.name: TV-Loving Spectator
text_block_list.text:
Well, I want Special Week to win! I was watching
this special feature where...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Here I am... at the Derby.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ha! A-as if! I'm as c-c-calm as ever!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
This'll be NO problem! You saw me in the Satsuki
Sho, right?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I have nothing to worry about! I'm going to win
today, that's all!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Even if it is the Derby! No! Precisely because it's the Derby!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I'll win this race, no matter what...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Then my mother will finally acknowledge me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Five minutes later...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
All I see before me... are carrots. Fields upon
rolling fields of carrots.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It's okay. I'm okay. There's nothing to worry
about...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I swear! They're so noisy! I haven't even walked
out yet!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh... But that means... Who are they cheering
for?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wow! Thank you for your support!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I won't lose this race! I'm gonna run with
everyone's support driving me forward!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna win the Derby and make all of you
proud!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
This one's for both my mom who gave birth to me,
and my mom who raised me!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to be the number one Umamusume in
Japan!
